# Reference Transcripts

A Chinese reader must fill in the Expected transcript column and mark each clip Usable (yes/no) before the v1 human sign-off acceptance gate can pass. A clip is "usable" when the library output matches the expected transcript to a satisfactory degree (>=70% character containment, LCS-based).

| Clip | Expected transcript | Usable (yes/no) |
